ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lawrence Siracusa for Bennett Hong (Petitioner/Trustee)

The Court inquired about investments without prior approval and whether it is an appropriate list profile for this special needs beneficiary. Mr. Siracusa stated this is an old trust which allowed the Trustee to invest in mutual funds, set forth the history of the conservatee's situation and current capacity, addressed the $900.00 chair is for a recliner for the conservatee, and that he would discuss the risky investments with his client. The Court granted the Second Account and Report of Successor Trustee, etc., (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
